title: Dancing Together
content: The town square was full of music during the summer festival. Sophie loved watching people dance, but she was too shy to join them. Then Ryan walked over and offered his hand with a kind smile. “One dance?” he asked. Sophie hesitated for a moment before saying yes. They laughed every time they missed a step, and soon they forgot about everyone around them. As the last song ended, Ryan thanked her for the dance. Sophie hoped the festival would return soon, but she hoped to see Ryan even sooner.
